name: Banana Fig Bran Bread
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Toasted wheat germ or bran
3/4 cup Mission figs, dried, quartered and stems removed
1 tbsp Canola oil or vegetable oil
recipeInstructions:
1. Add all the ingredients into the bread machine in the order listed.
2. Select white bread setting and push "Start".
3. The two-and-a-half pound loaf is filled with fruits and fibers, providing the RDA for potassium in two half-round slices.
